site.title: Rewrite the Source Code of Your Life
site.description: Your life is programmable. Rewrite your source code. Upgrade your life.

hero.subtitle: Rewrite your source code. Upgrade your life.

hook.sentence: Do you believe reality could be a simulation—like The Matrix?

appVsLife.title: Fix the Source Code, Not the Interface
appVsLife.description:
You don't fix an app at the interface. You fix it in the source code. Life is no different.

To transform your reality, you must rewrite the underlying source code of the self—the soul.

fur.title: FUR: The Inner Evolution Loop
fur.subtitle: Fix → Upgrade → Run
fur.description: "修行"—the Chinese term for spiritual practice (e.g., meditation)—literally means fix the code, then run it, mirroring how software is upgraded.

meditation.title: Meditation — Debugging the Source Code of the Self
meditation.description: Meditation is the debugger of the soul. Instead of fixing the surface — stress, anxiety, symptoms — you go inward, to the source code of the self. Patch limiting beliefs, remove toxic loops, and set your inner state to calm = true.

quantumReality.title: Reality as Compiled Code
quantumReality.description: Apps are built from binary code. Reality is compiled from quantum code (energy).

hawkins.title: The Metrics of Inner Evolution
hawkins.description: The Hawkins Scale measures consciousness as energy levels. Fix clears lower states, Upgrade raises your level, and Run manifests the reality in life experience.

footer.tagline: Rewrite your source code. Upgrade your life.
